name: canConfigureBusOff
title: canConfigureBusOff
syntax: long canConfigureBusOff(long channel, long canId, long flags);
description: Uses the defined ID of a message to set the bus state to BusOff.
This function requires minimum a Vector driver 9.6 and a network interface with ISO CAN FD support.
return: 1 = The disturbance for the defined ID was switched on successfully.0 = The disturbance for the defined ID could not switched on.
